The '''''Waterspire''''' was a [[Simiyiar-class light freighter|Mon Calamari ''Simiyiar''-class light freighter]].

==History==
Initially used by a crew of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operatives whose primary area of operations was located in the [[Wilpiet]] area, the ship was stolen by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Milacass]] at least two months after he joined the [[Granse Confederacy]]. In the process, he also damaged Rebel property and became a being wanted by [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]].<ref name="AIR" />

Milacass's made the ''Waterspire'' available to the [[Granse Confederacy]]. However, the loose organization of bounty hunters preferred to use their other two [[Starship/Legends|starships]], the ''[[Mist Laden]]'' and ''[[Nightcast]]'', because they were less striking—and thus, less noticeable. Due to this, Milacass did not bother to change the ship's markings or transponder codes during the following two months, as he saw no need to do so.<ref name="AIR" />
